creator: freebsd@moov.de
text:
>>Synopsis:       [NEW PORT] sysutils/p5-Sys-Virt: Perl bindings for 
>> libvirt
>>Arrival-Date:   Mon Nov 21 15:40:09 UTC 2011

I think the devel/ category would fit much better. Please commit
this port as devel/p5-Sys-Virt instead, NOT as sysutils/p5-Sys-Virt
as I wrote in my original submission.


Thanks
- Frank
